chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1375 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Sharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General along with Imran Badar, Accountant, District Account office Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. The statement/ compliance report along with certain documents has been filed on behalf of District Accounts officer, Sukukr. The accountant present on behalf of District Accounts officer, Sukkur has submitted that entire amount of petitioner has been released in her favour and no other amount is remained to be outstanding. On the statement and compliance report, it clearly seems that grievance of the petitioner has been resolved. Under these circumstances, instant petition is disposed of as infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
